name: JosiCat Cat Wet Food – Salmon & Spirulina in Sauce 85g
description: Made with carefully selected meat and fish ingredients, including salmon, this tasty wet food delivers essential nutrients to help maintain vitality and daily health. Added inulin supports healthy digestion by promoting beneficial intestinal flora, while spirulina provides natural antioxidants that help protect the body from oxidative stress. Taurine supports healthy vision and heart function, and Vitamin E contributes to natural cell protection. Free from grains, added sugar, soy, dairy products, artificial colourings, flavourings, and preservatives, this wholesome recipe offers a nutritious and highly palatable meal your cat can enjoy every day. Key Benefits Complete wet food for adult cats Made with salmon in a rich, flavourful sauce Ideal for cats that prefer fish-based recipes Grain-free with no added sugar Contains prebiotic inulin to support digestion Enriched with spirulina for natural antioxidants Added taurine to support heart and eye health Vitamin E helps protect cells from oxidative stress Free from soy, dairy, artificial colours, flavourings, and preservatives Convenient freshness pouch for easy serving Ingredients Meat and animal by-products (74.0% in pieces), fish and fish by-products (including 5.0% salmon), minerals, vegetable by-products (inulin 0.40%), spirulina 0.05%. Analytical Constituents Crude Protein 10.0%, Crude Fat 3.5%, Crude Ash 2.5%, Crude Fibre 0.4%. Nutritional Additives (per kg) Vitamin E 100mg, Biotin 100mcg, Taurine 520mg, Zinc 10mg, Manganese 2mg, Copper 1.2mg, Iodine 0.2mg. Feeding & Storage Serve as a complete daily meal for adult cats. Always provide fresh drinking water. Once opened, refrigerate at 2–6°C and consume within 24 hours. Serve at room temperature for best palatability.
